summary: Run a corrected-center Ramsey/T2star repeat for image231924_c01 after narrow weak-pi pODMR shifted the usable center upward and downgraded the old 1.593 MHz peak to likely residual detuning.
scientific_rationale: Terminal Ramsey showed a real oscillation but the 1.593 MHz peak was ambiguous. A terminal narrow weak-pi pODMR found the raw/fit-reference center at 3.8761166667 GHz, +0.250 MHz above the earlier Ramsey mw_freq (pointwise ratio allowed +0.500 MHz), making the old peak compatible with detuning from the programmed 2 MHz Ramsey carrier. A corrected-center Ramsey repeat is the direct test for T2star and 13C: the carrier should move toward 2 MHz if detuning was the issue, and any 13C sidebands near det +/- ~384 kHz can then be assessed without the previous center ambiguity.
comparison_targets: Doherty et al. Physics Reports 528, 1-45 (2013), DOI 10.1016/j.physrep.2013.02.001, for general NV resonance/field context
NV memory Ramsey FFT guardrail: choose det/tau span/points together and keep Nyquist above det plus sideband
expected_evidence: terminal bridge result and savedexperiment path
raw/readout-aware Ramsey review comparing raw readouts, pointwise normalization, and fitted-reference normalization
FFT with actual tau grid checking carrier near 2 MHz and sideband windows near det +/- calculated 13C Larmor
separate claim classification for Ramsey signal, T2star, and 13C
success_criteria: bridge queue idle before submission and pre-enqueue advisory has no hard blockers
acquisition completes tau 0..8 us, 51 points, 6 stored averages, 100000 repetitions per average
terminal review can decide whether T2star is supported or still needs redesign, and whether 13C is supported, absent, or unresolved
stop_conditions: bridge queue is not idle immediately before submission
project lifecycle is canceled or do_not_submit_or_mutate_bridge_queue is true
verifier or pre-enqueue advisory reports hard blockers
auto-align counts collapse or bridge execution fails before acquiring data
bridge_action: execute auto__ramsey corrected-center Ramsey/T2star repeat via managed batch path

target.seed_source: latest narrow weak-pi pODMR auto-align tracked position
